title: Rewrite this note to be pithier: Hi Peter,

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Rewrite this note to be pithier: Hi Peter,

Hope this note finds you well. I'm following up on our conversation two weeks ago to ask if you have additional insight into LPL. We would love to better understand how their key production roles are getting paid. Specifically, we're looking to understand anything related to:
Pay mix (ratio of base to variable, e.g. someone with $80K base and $20K incentive has an 80/20 pay mix) or pay level
Comp plan measures
Mechanics (commission vs. percent-to-goal formula)
Management comp - how are first-line managers getting paid
Below is a snapshot of our current understanding. Would love your thoughts on what we understand already and any gaps to be filled.

Happy to connect live this week, if that makes sense.

Thanks,
Calvin

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Hi Peter, Following up on our convo 2 weeks ago. Any new LPL insights on production roles' pay mix, comp plan measures, mechanics, and management comp? Here's our current understanding. Let's chat this week. Thanks, Calvin
